compressed_prompt:
Write a plot for a story about two people who swap fingerprints. Include a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>. In your response please avoid using commas.

Write a plot for a story about two people who swap fingerprints. Include <<swapping fates>> as title. No commas in the plot.
response:
<<swapping fates>>
Alexandra and Ryan lived parallel lives in the same city. They were both in their mid-twenties and had never met until the day they touched the same object at an art exhibition. The object was an ancient relic with mysterious powers. As soon as their skin made contact with it Alexandra felt a sudden jolt and so did Ryan. They both pulled their hands back and looked at each other in confusion. Later they discovered that their fingerprints had swapped. At first they thought it was just a strange coincidence but soon they realized that their lives were becoming intertwined. Alexandra was a law student and Ryan was a suspect in a crime investigation. As the police took Alexandra's fingerprints they matched them to the crime scene and she was arrested. Ryan on the other hand was able to clear his name using Alexandra's clean record. As they navigated their new reality they had to work together to switch back and clear Alexandra's name. They uncovered the relic's dark past and the true reason behind the fingerprint swap. In the end they managed to reverse the effect and restore their original fingerprints. Their lives went back to normal but they remained connected by the experience they shared.
